scripts.load-test:http: artillery run tests/load/http-scenarios.yml --output tests/load/http-report.json && artillery report tests/load/http-report.json --output tests/load/http-report.html
scripts.load-test:socket: artillery run tests/load/socket-scenarios.yml --output tests/load/socket-report.json && artillery report tests/load/socket-report.json --output tests/load/socket-report.html
scripts.load-test:all: npm run load-test:seed && npm run load-test:http && npm run load-test:socket && npm run load-test:cleanup
